query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.nombre, p.nivel,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plano_pines pp WHERE pp.plano_id = p.id AND pp.activo = 1) as plano_pines_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i WHERE i.pin_plano_id = p.id AND i.pin_pos_x IS NOT NULL AND i.pin_pos_y IS NOT NULL) as items_pin_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plano_pines pp INNER JOIN items i ON pp.item_id = i.id WHERE pp.plano_id = p.id AND pp.activo = 1 AND i.pin_plano_id = p.id) as overlap_count
FROM planos p 
WHERE p.proyecto_id = 1 AND p.activo = 1 
ORDER BY p.nivel, p.orden
